Patch Set 7:

how it's supposed to work?
I installed ZFS with make install (this is Fedora 29 distro), then tried to configure Lustre:
/configure --with-linux=/home/alexey/linux-4.18.0-32.el8 --with-zfs=/usr/local/src/zfs-0.8.1 --with-spl=/usr/local/src/spl-0.8.1/
and it sesms ZFS doesn't do its part:
$ pkg-config --list-all|grep -i zfs
$

Patch Set 7:

It does work if you have the default ZFS packaged installed in your image. We can and store in an rpm repo the ZFS packages and install them into the image. This patch with that approach works. This using the build tree method I have to investigate.

Patch Set 7:

"packaged" means RPM ?

Patch Set 7:

yes.

Patch Set 7: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Patch Set 7:

Alex can you tell me when you do a make install does:

pkg-config -libs -cflags libzfs

work?

Patch Set 8:

James, I don't quite understand how this can work with out-of-tree builds

Patch Set 8:

export PKG_CONFIG_PATH=$PKG_CONFIG_PATH:$zfs/lib/libzfs

the $zfs should be set by ./configure --with-zfs=/path/to/zfs

I built zfs from scratch and in $topdir/lib/libzfs the *.pc files are their so it should work. With make install it will work.

Patch Set 8:

oh, that's exactly the point - I wanted to build w/o make install, just --with-zfs=<zfs-source-tree>

Patch Set 8:

Okay I see what you want. I have a few ideas on how to do this.

sure, thanks in advance!

parents.subject: LU-14286 tests: reduce fallocate space sanity 150e

commit.subject: LU-9897 zfs: migrate autoconf detection to pkgconfig
commit.message:
LU-9897 zfs: migrate autoconf detection to pkgconfig

Currently we have extra complexity to determine where packages are
installed. This approach is also fragile if packages are not
installed in the standard location. This can be handled in a much
cleaner way with pkgconfig. Update ZFS handling to use its
supplied pkgconfig files it provides.

Test-Parameter: trivial

Change-Id: I752997a940b0a8c56772bd737f42a5acbd010abb
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
